message:
deps: bump libc 0.2.180 -> 0.2.185

Patch bump within 0.2.x. Additive FFI bindings only (new syscall constants,
new struct fields on newer glibc/musl). No code here hits a removed or
redefined binding.

Verification: rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -57,7 +57,7 @@ criterion = { version = "0.8.2", features = ["html_reports"] }
 crossbeam-epoch = "0.9.18"
 hex = "0.4.3"
 insta = "1.47.2"
-libc = "0.2.180"
+libc = "0.2.185"
 memchr = "2.7.4"
 parking_lot = "0.12.3"
 proptest = "1.6.0"
